{{Infobox character
| name = Del'rek
| aliases = Del’rek of the Shann, Del’rek
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = sacred elephant in human form
| abilities = restoration authority
| affiliations = Shann
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Del'rek of the [[Shann]] is a powerful individual who has joined the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]]. A sacred elephant appearing in human form, Del'rek is notably tall and possesses tusks. This entity is a highly skilled combatant; one master described a duel with Del'rek as an exceptionally intense experience that provided more value than a decade of solitary training. In combat, Del'rek utilizes a spear and demonstrates significant strength, capable of causing space to tremble with a single thrust. Additionally, Del'rek has been involved in retrieving weapons and navigating spatial distortions.}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Del'rek]] is of the [[Shann]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Del’rek of the [[Shann]] is a sacred elephant in human form.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Del’rek can lend restoration authority.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Del’rek of the [[Shann]] is a man taller than [[Lindon]] who has tusks and resembles a sacred elephant in human form.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33">''Waybound'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Del’rek is a character who observes something in the distance.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Shann]]
[[Category:Sacred beasts]]
